svg:
<title id="title>Audit Logging Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">Audit logging failure modes: tampering, ingestion gaps, retention failures, and access control issues
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="var(--bg-panel, #f8fafc)/>
Audit Logging Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)">Tampering, ingestion gaps, retention failures, and access issues
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">1. Tampering/Modification
<text x="130 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Original Entry <text" x="130" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">hash: abc123 <text x="130 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#6ee7b7>prev_hash: xyz789
<text x="220 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Modified!
<rect" x="245" y="150 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="315" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Modified Entry <text x="315 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>hash: ??? <text" x="315" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fca5a5">Chain broken!
<text x="235 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Evidence integrity compromised! <text" x="235" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Write access not restricted <text x="235 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Write-once storage, hash chains, signatures
<rect" x="460" y="85 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #f59e0b)" stroke-width="2/> 2. Ingestion Gaps
<rect" x="480" y="135 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #fffbeb)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #fcd34d)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="150 width="100" height="55" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="540" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Events Flow <text x="540 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>Normal
<text x="610 y="168" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Queue full
<rect" x="635" y="150 width="100" height="55" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="685" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">GAP <text x="685 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>Events lost
<text x="810 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Resume <text" x="810" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">Normal
<text x="665 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Critical events missing during incident! <text" x="665" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: No backpressure, dropped events <text x="665 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Priority queues, local buffering, alerts
<rect" x="30" y="340 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #8b5cf6)" stroke-width="2/> 3. Retention Failures
<rect" x="50" y="380 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #f5f3ff)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #c4b5fd)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="60" y="395 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #8b5cf6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #6d28d9)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="130" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Expected <text x="130 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#c4b5fd>Delete after 7 years <text" x="130" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#c4b5fd">Automated job
<line x1="205 y1="425" x2="235 y2="425" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Job failed
<text x="315 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Actual <text" x="315" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">Old data retained <text x="315 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>Compliance risk
<text" x="235" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Compliance violation or storage explosion! <text x="235 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Failed retention jobs, no monitoring <text" x="235" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Retention job alerts, audit storage growth
<text x="665 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">4. Access Control Issues
<text x="560 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Proper Access <text" x="560" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">RBAC enforced <text x="560 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#6ee7b7>Query logged
<text x="650 y="415" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Privilege abuse
<rect" x="675" y="395 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="745" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Unauthorized <text x="745 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>Admin abuse <text" x="745" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fca5a5">No audit trail
<text x="665 y="495" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Audit admins can hide their tracks! <text" x="665" y="515 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Audit admin not audited <text x="665 y="535" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Separate audit admin role, external logging
<marker" id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9 refY="3.5" orient="auto> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)/>
<marker" id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9 refY="3.5" orient="auto>
